activities.name: Copy data db2 to adls gen2

message.value: @concat('수행 실패 테이블 명 : '  , item().db_name,'.'  , item().schema_name,'.' , item().table_name)

value.value:
@concat(
  pipeline().Pipeline, ',',
  pipeline().RunId, ',',
  item().db_Name, ',',
  item().schema_Name, ',',
  item().table_Name, ',',
  string(first(activity('MLIWD').output.executionDetails).status), ',',
  string(first(activity('MLIWD').output.executionDetails).start), ',',
  addToTime(string(first(activity('MLIWD').output.executionDetails).start),activity('MLIWD').output.copyDuration,'second'), ',',
  activity('MLIWD').output.copyDuration,',',
  string(activity('MLIWD').output.rowsRead),',',
  string(activity('MLIWD').output.rowsCopied),',',
  string(activity('MLIWD').output.rowsSkipped),',',
  string(activity('MLIWD').output.dataConsistencyVerification.VerificationResult) , ',',
    activity('MLIWD').output.errors)

@concat(
  pipeline().Pipeline, ',',
  pipeline().RunId, ',',
  item().db_Name, ',',
  item().schema_Name, ',',
  item().table_Name, ',',
  string(first(activity('MLIWD').output.executionDetails).status), ',',
  string(first(activity('MLIWD').output.executionDetails).start), ',',
  addToTime(string(first(activity('MLIWD').output.executionDetails).start),activity('MLIWD').output.copyDuration,'second'), ',',
  activity('MLIWD').output.copyDuration,',',
  string(activity('MLIWD').output.rowsRead),',',
  ',',
  string(activity('MLIWD').output.rowsSkipped),',',
  string(activity('MLIWD').output.dataConsistencyVerification.VerificationResult) , ',',
    activity('MLIWD').output.errors)
